Who We Are

Built on Integrity, Rooted in Cleveland

Sterling Fence & Building started with a simple goal: to provide Cleveland residents with superior fencing solutions built to withstand our harsh winters and humid summers. We're a family-owned business that understands the importance of security, privacy, and curb appeal.

Our approach is simple: honest communication, meticulous workmanship, and premium materials. We don't cut corners, and we treat every project, big or small, with the same dedication and attention to detail. We believe in doing the job right the first time, ensuring lasting value for our clients.

We're proud to be a part of the Cleveland community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to create a positive impact through our work. From Tremont to Ohio City, we're committed to enhancing the beauty and security of our neighborhoods.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Sterling Fence & Building

Local Expertise

We understand Cleveland's climate and housing styles, ensuring the right fence for your property.

Quality Materials

We use premium-grade lumber, vinyl, and metal for lasting durability and beauty.

Expert Installation

Our experienced team provides professional installation, ensuring a secure and aesthetically pleasing result.

Satisfaction Guaranteed

We stand behind our workmanship and are committed to your complete satisfaction.

Protect & Beautify Your Property

Get a free estimate for your fence or building project today. Call us to discuss your needs and explore your options.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Sterling Fence & Building did an outstanding job installing our new wood fence. From the initial consultation to the final cleanup, they were professional, efficient, and detail-oriented. Our backyard looks amazing, and we feel much more secure. Highly recommend!

Sarah M. Wood Fence Installation
“

We needed a chain link fence installed quickly for our business property. Sterling Fence & Building provided a prompt and affordable solution. The installation was fast and efficient, and the fence looks great. Good value for the price.

David K. Chain Link Fence Installation
“

After a bad storm, part of our vinyl fence was damaged. Sterling Fence & Building responded quickly and repaired the fence seamlessly. You can't even tell there was damage. Great service and excellent workmanship!

Emily R. Vinyl Fence Repair
“

We hired Sterling Fence & Building to build a new deck, and we couldn't be happier with the results. They helped us design a deck that perfectly fits our needs and our backyard. The construction was top-notch, and the deck is beautiful. We highly recommend them!

Tom S. Deck Building
“

Sterling Fence & Building installed a privacy fence for me. Overall, I am pleased with the result. There was a slight delay due to weather, but the communication was good, and the fence looks great. Would use again.

Lisa B. Wood Fence Installation
“

Sterling Fence & Building built a beautiful pergola for our backyard. It's exactly what we wanted, and the quality of the work is excellent. They were professional, reliable, and easy to work with. Highly recommend!

Michael C. Pergola Construction

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How long will a wood fence last in Cleveland's climate?
With proper treatment and maintenance, a wood fence can last 15-20 years in Cleveland. Regular sealing and staining can help protect the wood from the elements and extend its lifespan.
What type of wood is best for fencing in Cleveland?
Cedar and pressure-treated lumber are excellent choices for fencing in Cleveland. Cedar is naturally resistant to rot and insects, while pressure-treated lumber is chemically treated to resist decay.
Do I need a permit to install a fence in Cleveland?
Permitting requirements vary depending on your location and the height of the fence. We can help you determine if a permit is needed and assist with the application process.
